---
title: "Analysis Skeleton (R Template)"
---

This is the annotated reference skeleton for a JASP R analysis file. Use it as a starting point for new analyses.

```r
#
# Copyright (C) 2024 University of Amsterdam
#
# This program is free software: you can redistribute it and/or modify
# it under the terms of the GNU General Public License as published by
# the Free Software Foundation, either version 2 of the License, or
# (at your option) any later version.
#

# Main function ----
# This is the only public function. Its name must match the
# function entry in Description.qml.
MockAnalysis <- function(jaspResults, dataset, options) {

  # Set the analysis title (shown in the results panel)
  jaspResults$title <- "Mock Analysis"

  # Init options: derive any values needed across the analysis
  options <- .mockInitOptions(jaspResults, options)

  # Read the dataset using built-in helpers
  dataset <- .mockReadData(options)

  # Validate data before computing
  errors <- .mockErrorHandling(dataset, options)

  # Compute results (cached via jaspState)
  mockResults <- .mockComputeResults(jaspResults, dataset, options)

  # Create output: containers, tables, plots
  # These functions modify jaspResults in place and return nothing.
  .mockContainerMain( jaspResults, options, mockResults)
  .mockTableSomething(jaspResults, options, mockResults)
  .mockTableSthElse(  jaspResults, options, mockResults)
  .mockPlotSomething( jaspResults, options, mockResults)

  return()
}

# Init functions ----
.mockInitOptions <- function(jaspResults, options) {
  # Derive any computed options or ready-checks here.
  options
}

.mockReadData <- function(options) {
  # Read data using JASP's built-in reader.
  # columns: numeric variables; columns.as.factor: categorical variables.
  if (options$groupvar == "") {
    dataset <- .readDataSetToEnd(columns = variables)
  } else {
    dataset <- .readDataSetToEnd(
      columns           = variables,
      columns.as.factor = options$groupvar
    )
  }
  dataset
}

.mockErrorHandling <- function(dataset, options) {
  # Validate the dataset. exitAnalysisIfErrors = TRUE stops cleanly.
  .hasErrors(dataset, "run",
    type                = c("observations", "variance", "infinity"),
    all.target          = options$variables,
    observations.amount = "< 2",
    exitAnalysisIfErrors = TRUE
  )
}

# Results functions ----
.mockComputeResults <- function(jaspResults, dataset, options) {
  # Cache expensive computations with createJaspState.
  if (is.null(jaspResults[["stateMockResults"]])) {
    mockResults <- .mockResultsHelper(dataset)

    jaspResults[["stateMockResults"]] <- createJaspState(mockResults)
    jaspResults[["stateMockResults"]]$dependOn("variables")
  } else {
    mockResults <- jaspResults[["stateMockResults"]]$object
  }
  mockResults
}

.mockResultsHelper <- function(dataset) {
  # Perform the actual statistical computations here.
}

# Output functions ----
.mockContainerMain <- function(jaspResults, options, mockResults) {
  # Early return if container already exists (caching).
  if (!is.null(jaspResults[["mockMainContainer"]])) return()

  mainContainer <- createJaspContainer("Model fit tables")
  mainContainer$dependOn(c("variables", "someotheroption"))

  jaspResults[["mockMainContainer"]] <- mainContainer
}

.mockTableSomething <- function(jaspResults, options, mockResults) {
  if (!is.null(jaspResults[["mockMainContainer"]][["mockTable"]])) return()

  # Create a table and set dependencies
  mockTable <- createJaspTable(title = gettext("Mock Table"))
  mockTable$dependOn(c("variables", "someotheroption"))

  # Attach to container
  jaspResults[["mockMainContainer"]][["mockTable"]] <- mockTable

  # Define columns: name (key), title (display), type, format
  mockTable$addColumnInfo(name = "chisq",  title = "\u03a7\u00b2",           type = "number", format = "sf:4")
  mockTable$addColumnInfo(name = "pvalue", title = "p",                      type = "number", format = "dp:3;p:.001")
  mockTable$addColumnInfo(name = "BF",     title = gettext("Bayes Factor"),  type = "number", format = "sf:4")
  mockTable$addColumnInfo(name = "sth",    title = gettext("Some Title"),    type = "string")

  # Fill columns with data
  mockTable[["chisq"]]  <- mockResults$column1
  mockTable[["pvalue"]] <- mockResults$column2
  mockTable[["BF"]]     <- mockResults$column3
  mockTable[["sth"]]    <- mockResults$sometext
}

.mockTableSthElse <- function(jaspResults, options, mockResults) {
  if (!is.null(jaspResults[["mockMainContainer"]][["mockTable2"]])) return()

  mockTable2 <- createJaspTable(title = gettext("Mock Table Something Else"))
  mockTable2$dependOn(c("variables", "someotheroption"))

  jaspResults[["mockMainContainer"]][["mockTable2"]] <- mockTable2

  mockTable2$addColumnInfo(name = "hallo", title = "Hallo", type = "string")
  mockTable2$addColumnInfo(name = "doei",  title = "Doei",  type = "string")

  mockSummary <- summary(mockResults$someObject)

  mockTable2[["hallo"]] <- ifelse(mockSummary$hallo > 1, "Hallo!", "Hello!")
  mockTable2[["doei"]]  <- mockSummary$doei^2
}

.mockPlotSomething <- function(jaspResults, options, mockResults) {
  if (!is.null(jaspResults[["mockPlot"]])) return()

  mockPlot <- createJaspPlot(title = gettext("Mock Plot"), height = 320, width = 480)
  mockPlot$dependOn(c("variables", "someotheroption"))

  jaspResults[["mockPlot"]] <- mockPlot

  # Assign a ggplot2 object (preferred) or base R plot
  mockPlot$plotObject <- plot(mockResults$someObject)
}
```

### Key Patterns

| Pattern | Why |
|---------|-----|
| Public function (`MockAnalysis`) has no `.` prefix | It is called from QML via Description.qml |
| Private helpers start with `.` | Hides them from the module NAMESPACE |
| `if (!is.null(...)) return()` at start of output functions | Avoids recreating cached output |
| `$dependOn(...)` on every element | Tells JASP when to recompute |
| `createJaspState()` for expensive results | Caches computation across reactive reruns |
| `gettext()` on all display strings | Enables translation |
| Unicode `\uXXXX` for special characters | Portable across locales |
